scripts.title: Meet Your AI Companion

scenes.label: hook
scenes.visual_prompt: Close-up of a glowing 3D anime-style avatar on a dark screen, slowly rotating. Cinematic lighting, soft particles floating around the character. Modern dark UI dashboard visible in the background.
scenes.voiceover: What if your AI assistant had a face — and a personality you designed yourself?

scenes.label: problem
scenes.visual_prompt: Split screen showing multiple generic chatbot interfaces — plain text boxes, no personality, sterile corporate designs. User looking bored at a laptop.
scenes.voiceover: Most AI tools are faceless text boxes. No personality, no presence — just a blinking cursor that feels like talking to a machine.

scenes.label: agitate
scenes.visual_prompt: Person scrolling through endless identical chat interfaces, each one looking exactly the same. Growing frustration shown through quick cuts.
scenes.voiceover: When every assistant feels the same, you lose the connection that makes AI actually useful. It becomes another tool you forget to open.

scenes.label: solution
scenes.visual_prompt: Smooth screen recording style: dark themed dashboard loads, a 3D VRM anime avatar appears center screen with dynamic idle animations. Camera zooms into the companion view showing the avatar responding with gestures. UI elements highlight as narration describes them — chat panel slides in from right, avatar reacts with expressions. Split view shows the avatar on desktop and mobile.
scenes.voiceover: Milady gives your AI a living, breathing presence. Your companion is a fully animated 3D avatar powered by VRM — the open standard for virtual characters. It greets you when you open the app, reacts while you chat, and becomes the visual identity of your personal AI. Customize its appearance, choose from preset avatars, or import your own VRM model. This isn't a novelty — it's the front door to everything your agent can do.

scenes.label: cta
scenes.visual_prompt: Wide shot of the full Milady dashboard with the companion avatar center stage. URL appears at bottom. Milady logo animates in.
scenes.voiceover: Launch Milady and meet your companion. Head to the companion tab to get started — your AI is waiting.

scripts.full_voiceover: What if your AI assistant had a face — and a personality you designed yourself? Most AI tools are faceless text boxes. No personality, no presence — just a blinking cursor that feels like talking to a machine. When every assistant feels the same, you lose the connection that makes AI actually useful. It becomes another tool you forget to open. Milady gives your AI a living, breathing presence. Your companion is a fully animated 3D avatar powered by VRM — the open standard for virtual characters. It greets you when you open the app, reacts while you chat, and becomes the visual identity of your personal AI. Customize its appearance, choose from preset avatars, or import your own VRM model. This isn't a novelty — it's the front door to everything your agent can do. Launch Milady and meet your companion. Head to the companion tab to get started — your AI is waiting.

scripts.title: Build Your Agent's Personality

scenes.label: hook
scenes.visual_prompt: Dramatic reveal of a character editor screen — fields filling in with text as if being typed live. Bio, personality traits, speaking style all populating in real time on a sleek dark UI.
scenes.voiceover: Your AI doesn't have to sound like every other assistant. You get to decide who it is.

scenes.label: problem
scenes.visual_prompt: Montage of different AI assistants all giving the same robotic, corporate-sounding responses. Same tone, same disclaimers, same bland personality. Text bubbles stack up looking identical.
scenes.voiceover: Every AI assistant sounds the same — polite, generic, forgettable. You ask for help and get a response that could've come from any tool on the market. There's no character, no voice, no soul.

scenes.label: agitate
scenes.visual_prompt: User trying to use a generic AI for their brand — the responses clash with their tone. Professional context getting casual replies. Creative context getting sterile corporate language.
scenes.voiceover: When your AI doesn't match your vibe, every interaction feels off. Your customers notice. Your team notices. A mismatched AI personality erodes trust instead of building it.

scenes.label: solution
scenes.visual_prompt: Smooth walkthrough of the Milady character editor. Camera pans across fields: Name, Bio, Lore sections filling in. Topics being added as tags. Style guide section with adjectives. Message examples appearing. Before-and-after comparison: generic response vs. character-tuned response side by side. The avatar's expression shifts to match the personality being configured.
scenes.voiceover: Milady's character editor puts you in control of exactly who your AI is. Start with the bio — give your agent a backstory, a purpose, a reason to exist. Add lore to build depth — the history and context that shapes how it thinks. Define topics it should care about and ones it should avoid. Then dial in the style: Is it formal or casual? Witty or straightforward? Technical or conversational? You set the adjectives, provide example messages, and Milady's runtime weaves it all into every response. The result is an agent that doesn't just answer questions — it answers them as the character you built.

scenes.label: cta
scenes.visual_prompt: Character editor with a completed profile, avatar nodding approvingly. Save button glows. Milady logo.
scenes.voiceover: Open the character tab and start shaping your agent's identity. Give it a name, a story, and a voice that's unmistakably yours.

scripts.full_voiceover: Your AI doesn't have to sound like every other assistant. You get to decide who it is. Every AI assistant sounds the same — polite, generic, forgettable. You ask for help and get a response that could've come from any tool on the market. There's no character, no voice, no soul. When your AI doesn't match your vibe, every interaction feels off. Your customers notice. Your team notices. A mismatched AI personality erodes trust instead of building it. Milady's character editor puts you in control of exactly who your AI is. Start with the bio — give your agent a backstory, a purpose, a reason to exist. Add lore to build depth — the history and context that shapes how it thinks. Define topics it should care about and ones it should avoid. Then dial in the style: Is it formal or casual? Witty or straightforward? Technical or conversational? You set the adjectives, provide example messages, and Milady's runtime weaves it all into every response. The result is an agent that doesn't just answer questions — it answers them as the character you built. Open the character tab and start shaping your agent's identity. Give it a name, a story, and a voice that's unmistakably yours.

scripts.title: Chat With Your Agent

scenes.label: hook
scenes.visual_prompt: Chat interface with messages flowing in real-time. The AI avatar appears in a small circle next to its responses. Typing indicator pulses.
scenes.voiceover: This is where your AI comes alive — in conversation.

scenes.label: problem
scenes.visual_prompt: Generic chat window with no context awareness. User repeats themselves across sessions. Previous conversations lost. No memory of past interactions.
scenes.voiceover: Most AI chats are throwaway sessions. Ask something today, and tomorrow it's forgotten. No memory, no continuity, no relationship.

scenes.label: agitate
scenes.visual_prompt: User re-explaining their project setup for the third time to a chat AI. Frustration building. Time wasting visualized with a clock spinning.
scenes.voiceover: Re-explaining yourself every session isn't just annoying — it makes AI feel like a toy instead of a tool you can rely on.

scenes.label: solution
scenes.visual_prompt: Milady chat interface in action. Messages stream in with the agent's personality visible in tone. Knowledge base references appear inline. Multi-turn conversation flows naturally. Agent uses tools, references past context, and maintains character throughout. TTS plays back responses with the avatar lip-syncing.
scenes.voiceover: Milady's chat isn't a blank slate — it's powered by your agent's full context. Your character's personality shapes every reply. The knowledge base you've uploaded informs its answers. Conversation history persists across sessions so your agent remembers what matters. It can invoke skills, use tools, and even speak its responses aloud with text-to-speech while the avatar lip-syncs. This is a real conversation with an AI that knows you.

scenes.label: cta
scenes.visual_prompt: Chat view with a warm exchange visible. Cursor blinking in the input field invitingly. Milady logo.
scenes.voiceover: Open the chat tab and start talking. Your agent is ready to listen — and it'll remember what you said.

scripts.full_voiceover: This is where your AI comes alive — in conversation. Most AI chats are throwaway sessions. Ask something today, and tomorrow it's forgotten. No memory, no continuity, no relationship. Re-explaining yourself every session isn't just annoying — it makes AI feel like a toy instead of a tool you can rely on. Milady's chat isn't a blank slate — it's powered by your agent's full context. Your character's personality shapes every reply. The knowledge base you've uploaded informs its answers. Conversation history persists across sessions so your agent remembers what matters. It can invoke skills, use tools, and even speak its responses aloud with text-to-speech while the avatar lip-syncs. This is a real conversation with an AI that knows you. Open the chat tab and start talking. Your agent is ready to listen — and it'll remember what you said.

scripts.title: Agent Wallets & Crypto

scenes.label: hook
scenes.visual_prompt: Crypto wallet interface on dark dashboard. Multiple chain logos (Ethereum, Solana, Base) glow and animate. Balance numbers tick upward.
scenes.voiceover: Your AI agent doesn't just talk about crypto — it can hold, send, and manage it.

scenes.label: problem
scenes.visual_prompt: Person juggling multiple wallet apps, browser extensions, and DeFi dashboards. Tabs everywhere. Copy-pasting addresses between windows.
scenes.voiceover: Managing crypto across chains is a mess of wallet extensions, seed phrases, and manual transactions. Every new chain means another tool, another interface, another thing to keep track of.

scenes.label: agitate
scenes.visual_prompt: Error screens, failed transactions, wrong network selected. A wrong address paste. The anxiety of on-chain operations.
scenes.voiceover: One wrong address, one wrong chain, and your funds are gone. The complexity isn't just inconvenient — it's a risk.

scenes.label: solution
scenes.visual_prompt: Milady wallets view showing multi-chain support. Wallet addresses listed cleanly. Balance overview across chains. Transaction history panel. Security indicators showing encrypted key storage. Agent executing a token swap autonomously in the background while the user watches.
scenes.voiceover: Milady gives your agent its own wallet infrastructure. From the wallets tab, you manage keys across multiple chains — Ethereum, Solana, Base, and more. Your agent can check balances, track portfolios, and execute transactions when you authorize it. Keys are stored securely with encrypted local storage, and you control exactly what permissions your agent has. Whether you're building a trading agent, a tipping bot, or just want your AI to manage a treasury — the wallet layer makes your agent a real on-chain participant.

scenes.label: cta
scenes.visual_prompt: Wallets view with a funded wallet visible. QR code for receiving. Milady logo.
scenes.voiceover: Head to the wallets tab to set up your agent's on-chain identity. Connect a chain and fund your agent to get started.

scripts.full_voiceover: Your AI agent doesn't just talk about crypto — it can hold, send, and manage it. Managing crypto across chains is a mess of wallet extensions, seed phrases, and manual transactions. Every new chain means another tool, another interface, another thing to keep track of. One wrong address, one wrong chain, and your funds are gone. The complexity isn't just inconvenient — it's a risk. Milady gives your agent its own wallet infrastructure. From the wallets tab, you manage keys across multiple chains — Ethereum, Solana, Base, and more. Your agent can check balances, track portfolios, and execute transactions when you authorize it. Keys are stored securely with encrypted local storage, and you control exactly what permissions your agent has. Whether you're building a trading agent, a tipping bot, or just want your AI to manage a treasury — the wallet layer makes your agent a real on-chain participant. Head to the wallets tab to set up your agent's on-chain identity. Connect a chain and fund your agent to get started.

scripts.title: Feed Your Agent Knowledge

scenes.label: hook
scenes.visual_prompt: Documents, PDFs, and web pages flying into a glowing knowledge orb. The orb pulses as it absorbs information. Neural network visualization in the background.
scenes.voiceover: What if your AI actually knew your business — not just the internet?

scenes.label: problem
scenes.visual_prompt: Person asking an AI about their company docs and getting generic, wrong answers. The AI making things up. Hallucination indicators flashing red.
scenes.voiceover: Generic AI hallucinates about your specific domain. It doesn't know your products, your docs, your processes. You get confident-sounding answers that are completely wrong.

scenes.label: agitate
scenes.visual_prompt: Team member sharing wrong AI-generated info in a meeting. Client getting incorrect product details from a chatbot. Trust breaking down.
scenes.voiceover: When your AI gives bad info with confidence, it erodes trust fast. Your team stops using it. Your customers lose faith. The tool becomes a liability.

scenes.label: solution
scenes.visual_prompt: Milady knowledge tab walkthrough. Drag-and-drop file upload area. Documents being uploaded — PDFs, text files, markdown. URL ingestion field with a webpage being crawled. Processing indicator showing chunking and embedding. Then switching to chat where the agent answers a question and cites the specific document it referenced. RAG pipeline visualization.
scenes.voiceover: Milady's knowledge system gives your agent a real understanding of your domain. Upload documents directly — PDFs, text, markdown — or paste URLs to ingest web content. Everything gets chunked, embedded, and indexed locally using vector embeddings. When your agent answers a question, it retrieves the most relevant passages from your knowledge base and grounds its response in real sources. No hallucination — just your data, surfaced intelligently. Add product docs, internal wikis, research papers, or training materials. Your agent becomes the expert on whatever you feed it.

scenes.label: cta
scenes.visual_prompt: Knowledge tab with several documents uploaded and indexed. Green checkmarks. Milady logo.
scenes.voiceover: Open the knowledge tab and start uploading. The more your agent knows, the more valuable every conversation becomes.

scripts.full_voiceover: What if your AI actually knew your business — not just the internet? Generic AI hallucinates about your specific domain. It doesn't know your products, your docs, your processes. You get confident-sounding answers that are completely wrong. When your AI gives bad info with confidence, it erodes trust fast. Your team stops using it. Your customers lose faith. The tool becomes a liability. Milady's knowledge system gives your agent a real understanding of your domain. Upload documents directly — PDFs, text, markdown — or paste URLs to ingest web content. Everything gets chunked, embedded, and indexed locally using vector embeddings. When your agent answers a question, it retrieves the most relevant passages from your knowledge base and grounds its response in real sources. No hallucination — just your data, surfaced intelligently. Add product docs, internal wikis, research papers, or training materials. Your agent becomes the expert on whatever you feed it. Open the knowledge tab and start uploading. The more your agent knows, the more valuable every conversation becomes.

scripts.title: Connect to Every Platform

scenes.label: hook
scenes.visual_prompt: Platform logos cascading in — Telegram, Discord, Twitter/X, Slack, WeChat. Each one connects to a central Milady node with glowing lines. The agent avatar appears in each platform simultaneously.
scenes.voiceover: One agent, every platform. Your AI shows up wherever your audience is.

scenes.label: problem
scenes.visual_prompt: Person managing separate bots for Discord, Telegram, and Twitter. Different dashboards, different configs, different personas. Chaos of browser tabs.
scenes.voiceover: Running AI across platforms means managing separate bots with separate configs. Different APIs, different behaviors, different headaches. Your agent's personality fragments across every channel.

scenes.label: agitate
scenes.visual_prompt: Same user getting inconsistent responses from the same 'agent' on different platforms. Discord users getting one personality, Telegram users getting another. Brand confusion.
scenes.voiceover: Inconsistency across channels confuses your community and dilutes your brand. Your agent should be the same everywhere — but managing that manually is a full-time job.

scenes.label: solution
scenes.visual_prompt: Milady connectors tab. Clean grid of platform cards — each showing connection status. Click on Telegram: API token field, group settings, permissions. Toggle to enable. Then Discord: bot token, server selection. Twitter: API keys. Each connector activating with a satisfying green status indicator. Split screen showing the same agent responding consistently across Telegram, Discord, and Twitter simultaneously.
scenes.voiceover: Milady's connector system deploys your agent to every platform from one dashboard. Open the connectors tab and you'll see cards for Telegram, Discord, Twitter, Slack, WeChat, and more. Each one takes just an API token and a few settings to activate. The magic is that your agent's personality, knowledge, and skills carry across every platform identically. Configure once in the character tab, and every connector inherits that identity. Your community gets the same experience whether they reach your agent on Discord or Telegram — same voice, same knowledge, same capabilities.

scenes.label: cta
scenes.visual_prompt: Connectors tab with multiple platforms showing green 'connected' status. Agent avatar appears in miniature on each platform card. Milady logo.
scenes.voiceover: Visit the connectors tab and plug in your first platform. Your agent is ready to go live wherever you need it.

scripts.full_voiceover: One agent, every platform. Your AI shows up wherever your audience is. Running AI across platforms means managing separate bots with separate configs. Different APIs, different behaviors, different headaches. Your agent's personality fragments across every channel. Inconsistency across channels confuses your community and dilutes your brand. Your agent should be the same everywhere — but managing that manually is a full-time job. Milady's connector system deploys your agent to every platform from one dashboard. Open the connectors tab and you'll see cards for Telegram, Discord, Twitter, Slack, WeChat, and more. Each one takes just an API token and a few settings to activate. The magic is that your agent's personality, knowledge, and skills carry across every platform identically. Configure once in the character tab, and every connector inherits that identity. Your community gets the same experience whether they reach your agent on Discord or Telegram — same voice, same knowledge, same capabilities. Visit the connectors tab and plug in your first platform. Your agent is ready to go live wherever you need it.

scripts.title: Configure Your Setup

scenes.label: hook
scenes.visual_prompt: Settings gear icon morphing into a control panel with sliders, toggles, and configuration fields. Sleek dark theme.
scenes.voiceover: Fine-tune every detail of how Milady runs on your machine.

scenes.label: problem
scenes.visual_prompt: User editing JSON config files by hand. Restarting processes. Checking environment variables in a terminal. Configuration scattered across multiple files.
scenes.voiceover: Configuring AI tools usually means editing config files, setting environment variables, and restarting services. One typo and nothing works.

scenes.label: solution
scenes.visual_prompt: Milady settings page walkthrough. Clean sections for API keys, model selection, audio/TTS settings, privacy controls, and advanced options. User toggling TTS on, selecting a voice model from a dropdown. Entering an API key with masked input. Theme toggle between dark and light mode.
scenes.voiceover: Milady's settings page gives you a visual control panel for everything. Set your AI provider API keys, choose your preferred language model, configure text-to-speech voices, and manage privacy settings — all through clean toggles and fields. No config files to edit. Changes take effect immediately. Model selection lets you switch between providers on the fly. Audio settings control TTS voice and playback. And the advanced section handles port configuration, embedding models, and debug options for developers.

scenes.label: cta
scenes.visual_prompt: Settings page fully configured with green indicators. Milady logo.
scenes.voiceover: Head to settings to dial in your preferences. A few toggles and your setup is exactly how you want it.

scripts.full_voiceover: Fine-tune every detail of how Milady runs on your machine. Configuring AI tools usually means editing config files, setting environment variables, and restarting services. One typo and nothing works. Milady's settings page gives you a visual control panel for everything. Set your AI provider API keys, choose your preferred language model, configure text-to-speech voices, and manage privacy settings — all through clean toggles and fields. No config files to edit. Changes take effect immediately. Model selection lets you switch between providers on the fly. Audio settings control TTS voice and playback. And the advanced section handles port configuration, embedding models, and debug options for developers. Head to settings to dial in your preferences. A few toggles and your setup is exactly how you want it.

scripts.title: Monitor Agent Health

scenes.label: hook
scenes.visual_prompt: Pulsing heartbeat line on a dark dashboard — like a medical monitor but for AI. Green pulse, steady rhythm. Status indicators glowing.
scenes.voiceover: Is your agent alive, healthy, and doing its job? Heartbeats tells you at a glance.

scenes.label: problem
scenes.visual_prompt: Agent goes silent. User wondering if it crashed, if the API key expired, if the connection dropped. No visibility. Black box.
scenes.voiceover: When your AI agent goes quiet, you have no idea why. Is it crashed? Rate-limited? Processing? Without monitoring, you're flying blind.

scenes.label: solution
scenes.visual_prompt: Milady heartbeats dashboard. Activity timeline showing agent actions over time. Status cards showing uptime, last response time, active connections. Heartbeat pulse animation. Graphs showing response latency and message volume. Alert indicators for any issues.
scenes.voiceover: The heartbeats tab is your agent's vital signs dashboard. See real-time activity — when your agent last responded, which platforms it's active on, and how it's performing. The activity timeline shows every action your agent has taken, so you can audit its behavior over time. Status indicators flag connection issues, API errors, or unusual silence before they become problems. Think of it as mission control for your AI — always-on awareness of exactly what your agent is doing and how well it's doing it.

scenes.label: cta
scenes.visual_prompt: Heartbeats dashboard showing a healthy, active agent. All green indicators. Milady logo.
scenes.voiceover: Check the heartbeats tab to see your agent's pulse. Keep it healthy, keep it running, keep it accountable.

scripts.full_voiceover: Is your agent alive, healthy, and doing its job? Heartbeats tells you at a glance. When your AI agent goes quiet, you have no idea why. Is it crashed? Rate-limited? Processing? Without monitoring, you're flying blind. The heartbeats tab is your agent's vital signs dashboard. See real-time activity — when your agent last responded, which platforms it's active on, and how it's performing. The activity timeline shows every action your agent has taken, so you can audit its behavior over time. Status indicators flag connection issues, API errors, or unusual silence before they become problems. Think of it as mission control for your AI — always-on awareness of exactly what your agent is doing and how well it's doing it. Check the heartbeats tab to see your agent's pulse. Keep it healthy, keep it running, keep it accountable.

scripts.title: Extend With Plugins

scenes.label: hook
scenes.visual_prompt: Plugin blocks snapping together like building blocks. Each block has a different icon — database, blockchain, image generation, web search. They assemble into a complete agent.
scenes.voiceover: Your agent's capabilities aren't fixed. Plugins let you add any feature imaginable.

scenes.label: problem
scenes.visual_prompt: Developer hitting the limits of a closed AI platform. 'Feature not supported' messages. Workarounds piling up. Custom integrations that break on every update.
scenes.voiceover: Closed AI platforms hit a wall fast. Need a custom integration? Too bad. Want to add blockchain support? Write it yourself. Every missing feature is a dead end.

scenes.label: agitate
scenes.visual_prompt: Developer maintaining a fragile stack of custom code, API wrappers, and glue scripts. Dependency hell visualization.
scenes.voiceover: Building custom integrations from scratch for every capability means maintaining fragile code that breaks with every upstream update. It's unsustainable.

scenes.label: solution
scenes.visual_prompt: Milady advanced/plugins tab. Grid of available plugins with toggle switches. Plugin details panel showing description, version, actions provided. User enabling plugins — image generation, blockchain, web search, SQL. Each plugin activating and adding new capabilities to the agent. Code snippet showing a plugin's action registration.
scenes.voiceover: Milady is built on elizaOS — an open plugin architecture where every capability is modular. The advanced tab shows every plugin available in your installation. Toggle them on or off to shape what your agent can do. Each plugin can add actions, services, providers, and evaluators to the runtime. The ecosystem includes plugins for image generation, blockchain interactions, web browsing, database access, and dozens more. And since it's open source, you can write your own plugins or pull from the community. Your agent grows with your needs — no artificial limits.

scenes.label: cta
scenes.visual_prompt: Advanced tab with several plugins enabled. Agent performing an action from an enabled plugin. Milady logo.
scenes.voiceover: Explore the advanced tab to see what plugins are available. Enable what you need — your agent becomes more powerful with every toggle.

scripts.full_voiceover: Your agent's capabilities aren't fixed. Plugins let you add any feature imaginable. Closed AI platforms hit a wall fast. Need a custom integration? Too bad. Want to add blockchain support? Write it yourself. Every missing feature is a dead end. Building custom integrations from scratch for every capability means maintaining fragile code that breaks with every upstream update. It's unsustainable. Milady is built on elizaOS — an open plugin architecture where every capability is modular. The advanced tab shows every plugin available in your installation. Toggle them on or off to shape what your agent can do. Each plugin can add actions, services, providers, and evaluators to the runtime. The ecosystem includes plugins for image generation, blockchain interactions, web browsing, database access, and dozens more. And since it's open source, you can write your own plugins or pull from the community. Your agent grows with your needs — no artificial limits. Explore the advanced tab to see what plugins are available. Enable what you need — your agent becomes more powerful with every toggle.

scripts.title: Teach Your Agent Skills

scenes.label: hook
scenes.visual_prompt: Agent avatar learning new abilities — visual effects showing skill icons being absorbed. Web search, image creation, code execution, file management icons flowing into the avatar.
scenes.voiceover: Your agent can learn new tricks. Skills turn it from a chatbot into a worker.

scenes.label: problem
scenes.visual_prompt: Chat AI that can only respond with text. User asking it to do things — search the web, create files, check prices — and getting 'I can't do that' responses.
scenes.voiceover: A chatbot that can only type text back at you is half the story. You want your AI to actually do things — search, create, analyze, act. But most tools stop at conversation.

scenes.label: solution
scenes.visual_prompt: Milady skills tab. Organized grid of available skills — each with a name, description, and enabled status. Categories visible: web, creative, analysis, utility. User browsing and enabling skills. Then switching to chat where the agent uses an enabled skill — performing a web search, generating an image, or executing a workflow.
scenes.voiceover: Skills are the actions your agent can perform beyond conversation. The skills tab shows every capability available — from web search and image generation to file management and data analysis. Browse by category, read what each skill does, and enable the ones you want. With seventy-eight built-in skills and the ability to add custom ones, your agent becomes a true worker. Ask it to research a topic and it searches the web. Ask for an image and it generates one. Skills bridge the gap between talking about work and actually doing it.

scenes.label: cta
scenes.visual_prompt: Skills tab with multiple skills enabled. Agent executing a skill in a chat window. Milady logo.
scenes.voiceover: Open the skills tab and see what your agent can learn. Enable a skill, then ask your agent to use it — you'll see the difference immediately.

scripts.full_voiceover: Your agent can learn new tricks. Skills turn it from a chatbot into a worker. A chatbot that can only type text back at you is half the story. You want your AI to actually do things — search, create, analyze, act. But most tools stop at conversation. Skills are the actions your agent can perform beyond conversation. The skills tab shows every capability available — from web search and image generation to file management and data analysis. Browse by category, read what each skill does, and enable the ones you want. With seventy-eight built-in skills and the ability to add custom ones, your agent becomes a true worker. Ask it to research a topic and it searches the web. Ask for an image and it generates one. Skills bridge the gap between talking about work and actually doing it. Open the skills tab and see what your agent can learn. Enable a skill, then ask your agent to use it — you'll see the difference immediately.

scripts.title: Debug & Understand Your Agent

scenes.label: hook
scenes.visual_prompt: Terminal-style log output scrolling rapidly on a dark screen. Log lines highlighting in green, yellow, and red. A magnifying glass zooms in on a specific entry.
scenes.voiceover: See exactly what your agent is thinking, doing, and why.

scenes.label: problem
scenes.visual_prompt: Agent giving an unexpected response. Developer scratching their head. No way to see what happened internally. Black box with a question mark.
scenes.voiceover: When your agent does something unexpected, you need to know why. Without logs, debugging AI behavior is like fixing a car with the hood welded shut.

scenes.label: solution
scenes.visual_prompt: Milady logs tab. Structured log entries with timestamps, log levels (info, warn, error), and source tags. Filter controls at the top — by level, by plugin, by time range. User filtering to see only errors. Expanding a log entry to see full context. Plugin lifecycle events, API calls, knowledge retrieval steps, action execution traces all visible.
scenes.voiceover: The logs tab gives you full transparency into your agent's runtime. Every action, every decision, every API call is logged with timestamps and context. Filter by log level to focus on errors and warnings, or expand the full trace to understand exactly how your agent processed a request. See which plugins fired, what knowledge was retrieved, and how the response was composed. For developers, this is the debugger for AI behavior — trace the full lifecycle from user input to agent output and identify exactly where things went right or wrong.

scenes.label: cta
scenes.visual_prompt: Logs tab with a clean filtered view. A resolved error entry highlighted. Milady logo.
scenes.voiceover: Open the logs tab next time something seems off. The answer is always in the trace.

scripts.full_voiceover: See exactly what your agent is thinking, doing, and why. When your agent does something unexpected, you need to know why. Without logs, debugging AI behavior is like fixing a car with the hood welded shut. The logs tab gives you full transparency into your agent's runtime. Every action, every decision, every API call is logged with timestamps and context. Filter by log level to focus on errors and warnings, or expand the full trace to understand exactly how your agent processed a request. See which plugins fired, what knowledge was retrieved, and how the response was composed. For developers, this is the debugger for AI behavior — trace the full lifecycle from user input to agent output and identify exactly where things went right or wrong. Open the logs tab next time something seems off. The answer is always in the trace.
